title: Glowing Ender Eye
description: Eye of ender now glows when and after thrown, making it easier to see in dark environments.
body:
# Glowing Ender Eye

## English

A lightweight Architectury-based Minecraft mod.  
Thrown Eyes of Ender will glow, so they are easier to track in dark areas. Dropped Eyes of Ender will also emit light, making them easier to find.

## License

AGPL-3.0
